description: Launched in 2017, TRON (TRX) is the native token of the TRON network. Yet its ecosystem has become increasingly centralized, with unpredictable fees, wallet constraints, and limited adoption for third-party DApps. On AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 TRX offers TRX holders 1:1 pegged liquidity, instant finality, ultra-low fees, and scalability for DeFi, NFT, and AI uses across Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Tron
